data.body:
Tsukuba Express. A 60km passenger rail service in Japan. It runs at 130km/h on 1,067mm (cape gauge) tracks, the same narrow gauge we have in AoNZ. 
Power supply is a mix of 20 kV AC, 50 Hz (same as Auckland) and 1,500 V DC. 

Pukekohe to Te Rapa is 80km. 

Just sayin…
